name: Crest Nicholson Holdings PLC
description: A housebuilder focused on sustainable homes and master-planned communities across southern England. Significant exceptional charges from combustible materials remediation. Going concern material uncertainty flagged.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Volume recovery from 1,873 completions toward 3,000. Open market ASP £403k. 31,635 plot land bank (£11.5bn GDV pipeline). Average 44 sales outlets.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating margin recovery from 5.1% trough. Gross margin 14% in FY2024, land portfolio forecast gross margin 23%. Cost efficiency and volume leverage needed.
assumptions.risks: Going concern material uncertainty flagged by auditors. £160m exceptional charges in FY2024 (combustible materials £132m). Net debt £8.5m vs net cash £277m two years ago. Covenant breach risk in downside scenario. Heavy land creditors (£132m).
assumptions.catalyst: Volume recovery, margin normalisation, resolution of combustible materials liabilities, planning reform benefits. Potential M&A target for larger builders.
